steps.title: Calculate total ounces of blueberries needed
steps.content:
Each scone requires 3.5 ounces, and we're making 40 scones.
$$3.5 \text{ ounces/scone} \times 40 \text{ scones} = 140 \text{ ounces}$$

steps.title: Convert ounces to pounds
steps.content:
The problem asks for the answer in pounds. Use the given conversion: 1 pound = 16 ounces.
$$\frac{140 \text{ ounces}}{16 \text{ ounces/pound}} = 8.75 \text{ pounds}$$
That matches Choice A — 8.75.
